titleStmt.title: SII 17.532: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 532. (A.R. No. 490 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: In the second gōpura (left of the entrance) of the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date viz. Viya (Vyaya) Mithuna śu. 10, Monday correspond to 1466 A.D., June 23.

This inscription is damaged. It seems to record the gift of the proceeds from the levies viz. śūlavari, ōlai-eḻuttuvattaṉai, avatara vattaṉai, adhikāripēṟu i.e., koṟṟilakkai, pāḍikāval, śādi(jāti)vari, iṉavari, veṭṭiv�, etc, to the deity, by Devarāya-Mūvarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śthāpaṉa pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu
paccima Uttara camuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟatāpa tevamakaārāyar piṟitivirācciyam
mel cellāniṉṟa viya varuṣam mituṉa nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum coma
kuṭaiyatampirāṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa tevamaṇṭalattukku
tevarāyamuvarāyar caṟuvamāṉiyam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Inta nāyaṉār
vaippaṭṭaikkum pūcai mikuti cūlavari Irekai muṉpilāṇṭum māṉṉiyam
ṇikkai Olaieḻuttuvattaṉai Avataravattaṉai Atikāripeṟāṉa koṟṟilak
cūṭu pāṭikāval cātivariiṉavari veṭṭivari maṟṟum Ucāvaṭiyil kūṭṭum
ṟātittavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiyam Āka naṭakkak kaṭavatu Ākavum 2 samamu
Digital edition of SII 17.532 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
